testcase.name: test_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@adphantom.com' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dc9fc0>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dc9fc0> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dcabc0>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dcabc0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBhZHBoYW50b20uY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2MTMwMTgwfQ.neruRHZezEti-ECKjJFVrJXr2XMTXrmg_zNRa8_arM4', 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_conversions_api.py:31: in test_login_success assert data.get("user", {}).get("email") == ADMIN_EMAIL E AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@adphantom.com' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dc9fc0>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dc9fc0> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dcabc0>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd28b0dcabc0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBhZHBoYW50b20uY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2MTMwMTgwfQ.neruRHZezEti-ECKjJFVrJXr2XMTXrmg_zNRa8_arM4', 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get

testcase.name: test_get_leads

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'leads': [{'charge_amount': 0.0, 'created_at': '2026-04-07T01:29:41.139680+00:00', 'email': 'test_3cabcf31@example.com', 'has_unread_messages': False, ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 1}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_conversions_api.py:164: in test_get_leads assert isinstance(data, list), "Response should be a list" E AssertionError: Response should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'leads': [{'charge_amount': 0.0, 'created_at': '2026-04-07T01:29:41.139680+00:00', 'email': 'test_3cabcf31@example.com', 'has_unread_messages': False, ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 1}, list)

testcase.name: test_cleanup_test_data
testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_conversions_api.py:516: in test_cleanup_test_data if lead.get("name", "").startswith("TEST_"): ^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
